description: Learn the essential skills of chopping vegetables safely and efficiently.

steps.instruction: Gather your ingredients and tools: a cutting board, a chef's knife, and vegetables to chop.
Demonstrate how to hold the knife properly for safety.
Show the proper technique for chopping, including the claw grip for holding the vegetable.
Practice chopping different vegetables, focusing on speed and safety.
Clean up your workspace and store your knife safely.

safety_tips: Always cut away from your body.
Keep your fingers curled under when holding the vegetable.
Use a stable cutting board to prevent slipping.
